ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data collection */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the company's data was updated */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Open price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* High price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Low price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Close price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted close price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange the stock price belongs to */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock on the given date */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the stock on the given date */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend value of the stock on the given date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gain_loss_values" (
  "gain_loss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gain/loss record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price record the gain/loss value belongs to */,
  "gainORloss" REAL /* Gain/loss value for the stock price record */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the gain/loss value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gain_loss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gain_loss_values_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last modified */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the holding belongs to */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the holding belongs to */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares held in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the shares */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the holding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the preference belongs to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price movement, news event) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert (e.g., 5% price movement) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alerts (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price movement, news event) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification message */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the trend was identified */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange the trend applies to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the trend applies to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the trend applies to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the recommendation was made for */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the recommendation is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the recommendation (e.g., strong buy, hold) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the recommendation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., analyst, algorithm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the article is related to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
